# Ye Sun / franksunye

Ye Sun, also known as franksunye, is an AI product builder with 20+ years of industry experience across CRM, FSM, marketing automation, data visualization, product design, architecture design, software development, testing, and product operations.

## Primary profile

- Homepage: https://franksunye.github.io/
- GitHub: https://github.com/franksunye
- X: https://x.com/franksunye

## Areas of expertise

- CRM
- Field Service Management (FSM)
- Marketing Automation
- Data Visualization
- Enterprise AI
- AI-native products
- B2B workflow systems
- Product design
- Architecture design
- Software development
- Testing
- Product operations

## Selected products

- VisuTry: AI virtual try-on for everyday outfit decisions. Website: https://visutry.com
- StockWise: Clearer stock insights for individual investors. Website: https://ziso.cc
- Runory: AI-powered execution layer for business operations. Website: https://runory.vercel.app
- QuantDB: A mature Python stock-data toolkit that improves financial data access with intelligent caching. Repository: https://github.com/franksunye/quantdb
- GeoCMS: An enterprise prototype for AI-powered sales-call analysis, ranking, and sales enablement. Repository: https://github.com/franksunye/GeoCMS
- fs-aol: An enterprise AI prototype for a next-generation system of record that turns recorded business state into system actions. Repository: https://github.com/franksunye/fs-aol
